name: Apple Pie Italian (Crostata Di Mele)
recipeInstructions: Prepare Tart Dough. Heat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Toss together apples and lemon juice. Roll three-fourths of the dough into an 11-inch circle on a lightly floured surface. Ease the dough into an ungreased 9 x 1 1/4-inch pie plate, pressing firmly against the bottom and side. Turn the apples into the pie plate and sprinkle with sugar. Roll remaining dough into an 11 x 5-inch rectangle. Cut lengthwise into 11 strips, each 1/2 inch wide. Arrange the strips in a lattice pattern on top of the apples. Fold the edge of the lower crust over the ends of the strips. Seal and flute the pastry. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
